title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Gaming groups urge Congress to ban prediction markets sports betting in CLARITY Act
summary: Gaming groups urge Congress to ban prediction markets sports betting in CLARITY Act
briefing: Gambling industry groups want the US Senate to step in to clarify that the Commodity Futures Trading Commission does not have the authority to oversee prediction markets.

title: Crypto-backed GOP candidate wins Alabama Senate runoff with June primaries looming
summary: Crypto-backed GOP candidate wins Alabama Senate runoff with June primaries looming
briefing: Several more US states are scheduled to hold primaries next week after one Republican candidate won in Alabama on Tuesday after a crypto company-backed PAC used what it called its “biggest spend of the cycle.”

title: Bitcoin capitulation ‘twice as weak’ after spot liquidity turns supportive: Glassnode
summary: Bitcoin capitulation ‘twice as weak’ after spot liquidity turns supportive: Glassnode
briefing: Bitcoin’s realized losses fell by 46% as increasing bid-side liquidity points to easing sell pressure. Can bulls push BTC price back above $70,000?

title: Bybit lands on Singapore MAS Investor Alert List
summary: Bybit lands on Singapore MAS Investor Alert List
briefing: Crypto exchange Bybit has been added to Singapore’s MAS Investor Alert List, which flags entities that may be mistakenly perceived as licensed or regulated.

title: Blockchain.com deepens onchain stock offerings as tokenized equities market grows
summary: Blockchain.com deepens onchain stock offerings as tokenized equities market grows
briefing: The rollout in collaboration with Ondo Finance broadens access to tokenized traditional assets as demand for onchain stocks and ETFs continues to grow.

title: Altcoin selling tops $266B as capital rotates out of crypto: Is altseason extinct?
summary: Altcoin selling tops $266B as capital rotates out of crypto: Is altseason extinct?
briefing: Altcoin spot demand fell to its weakest level in six years while the stablecoin market cap, stocks and AI industry continued to capture investors’ attention.

title: Kalshi adds software partner as it looks to boost prediction market surveillance
summary: Kalshi adds software partner as it looks to boost prediction market surveillance
briefing: The collaboration comes as US state regulators and the CFTC battle over oversight of event-based contracts.

title: Michigan Federal Judge Rules Sports Prediction Markets Are Not Under CFTC Purview
summary: Michigan Federal Judge Rules Sports Prediction Markets Are Not Under CFTC Purview
briefing: The judge said Polymarket is not likely to succeed on the merits of its case against Michigan state regulators.

title: SpaceX Surge Could Be Worth Billions for FTX—Will Creditors Benefit?
summary: SpaceX Surge Could Be Worth Billions for FTX—Will Creditors Benefit?
briefing: Defunct crypto exchange FTX gained exposure to SpaceX in 2022, and the rocket-maker’s post-IPO rally has lifted hopes among creditors.

title: Nvidia Built Robots That Train Themselves Using AI Coding Agents
summary: Nvidia Built Robots That Train Themselves Using AI Coding Agents
briefing: Nvidia's ENPIRE hands an entire robot fleet to coding agents like Codex and Claude Code, letting them write training code, test it on real hardware, and improve without a human watching.

title: CoinFund, Coinbase Back Stablecoin Payments Startup Trace Finance in $32 Million Raise
summary: CoinFund, Coinbase Back Stablecoin Payments Startup Trace Finance in $32 Million Raise
briefing: Stablecoin infrastructure firm Trace Finance said Wednesday that it raised a $32 million Series A round to help expand its reach.

title: Estonia Wants to Give AI Agents Their Own National ID
summary: Estonia Wants to Give AI Agents Their Own National ID
briefing: Prime Minister Kristen Michal backed a proposal to issue AI agents a personal identification code separate from the people who own them.

title: Coinbase-Backed Crypto Perps Exchange Satori Finance Is Shutting Down
summary: Coinbase-Backed Crypto Perps Exchange Satori Finance Is Shutting Down
briefing: Perps DEX Satori Finance is the latest in a string of crypto firms forced to shut their doors amid an extended market downturn.

title: Bitcoin Slides as Fed Says It Will 'Deliver Price Stability' Under Kevin Warsh
summary: Bitcoin Slides as Fed Says It Will 'Deliver Price Stability' Under Kevin Warsh
briefing: The first FOMC meeting under new Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh produced the expected result, yet Bitcoin and other assets dipped.

title: GLAAD Says AI Is Failing LGBTQ Users—And Warns the Risk Is Growing
summary: GLAAD Says AI Is Failing LGBTQ Users—And Warns the Risk Is Growing
briefing: GLAAD's report argues AI systems can amplify anti-LGBTQ bias, misinformation, discrimination, and privacy harms.
